cadence_note: The Quick Stats bulk dumps at https://www.nass.usda.gov/datasets/ are re-stamped on a weekly cycle (qs.<sector>_<YYYYMMDD>.txt.gz). NASS publishes no cadence for the bulk files, so this is inferred: stamps observed on 2026-06-18 and 2026-07-09, both Thursdays, each with a matching Last-Modified. Every file is a complete snapshot, so a missed week costs freshness and nothing else.
